title.zh: 欢乐点镇的红眼飞行怪物
title.en: The Red-Eyed Winged Creature of Point Pleasant

summary.zh: 1966至1967年间在西弗吉尼亚州欢乐点镇频繁目击的人形飞行生物，双眼发出红光；1967年银桥垮塌后，它被与灾难预兆联系在一起。
summary.en: A winged humanoid with glowing red eyes reported around Point Pleasant, West Virginia in 1966-67; after the Silver Bridge collapse of December 1967 it became tied to omens of disaster.

description.zh:
1966年11月15日深夜，两对年轻夫妇驾车经过欢乐点镇北郊废弃的二战军火厂区（当地人称「TNT区」），看见一个约两米高的灰色人形立在路旁，背后收拢着巨大的翅膀，双眼像自行车反光镜一样发出红光。当他们加速逃离时，那东西展开约三米宽的翅膀，不扇动却贴着车顶追出数公里，时速接近一百六十公里。《欢乐点纪事报》次日刊出报道，「天蛾人」（报纸编辑仿照当时的蝙蝠侠电视剧起的绰号）随即成为全国新闻。

此后的十三个月里，小镇及周边陆续出现上百起目击报告，多集中在TNT区的旧弹药掩体一带。1967年12月15日傍晚，连接西弗吉尼亚与俄亥俄的银桥（Silver Bridge）在晚高峰中突然垮塌，四十六人坠河遇难。事故原因后来查明是一根眼杆的应力腐蚀断裂，但天蛾人目击随之骤停，「怪物预告了灾难」的说法从此与它绑定。

超自然作家约翰·基尔1975年的《天蛾人预言》（The Mothman Prophecies）把目击、UFO传闻与银桥惨案编织成完整叙事，2002年被改编为理查·基尔主演的同名电影。如今欢乐点镇立起一座不锈钢天蛾人雕像（2003年落成），设有天蛾人博物馆，每年九月的天蛾人节吸引数万游客，红眼怪物成了这座河边小镇的名片。
description.en:
Late on November 15, 1966, two young couples driving past the abandoned World War II munitions works north of Point Pleasant — the "TNT area" — saw a gray, man-shaped figure about two meters tall with huge folded wings and eyes that glowed red like bicycle reflectors. As they fled, the thing spread a three-meter wingspan and, without flapping, paced their car for miles at speeds near a hundred miles an hour. The Point Pleasant Register ran the story the next day, and "Mothman," a nickname a newspaper copy editor coined after the then-popular Batman TV series, went national.

Over the following thirteen months, more than a hundred sightings clustered around the old ammunition bunkers. Then, at rush hour on December 15, 1967, the Silver Bridge linking West Virginia and Ohio collapsed into the river, killing forty-six people. Investigators traced the failure to a corroded eyebar, but the sightings stopped almost at once, and the creature became fixed in legend as a herald of catastrophe.

John Keel's 1975 book The Mothman Prophecies wove the sightings, UFO rumors, and the bridge disaster into a single narrative, filmed in 2002 with Richard Gere. Point Pleasant now has a stainless-steel Mothman statue erected in 2003, a Mothman Museum, and an annual September festival that draws tens of thousands of visitors.

value.en: November 15, 1966, in the TNT area near Point Pleasant

value.zh: 天蛾人雕像（2003）与年度天蛾人节
value.en: Mothman statue (2003) and the annual Mothman Festival

label.zh: 西弗吉尼亚州欢乐点镇
